visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit warehouse retail setting with tall shelves packed with yellow and blue packaging. Centered in the frame are multiple boxes filled with large 'Minions' themed gummy bags, each featuring bright yellow character graphics. A large corporate logo is overlaid at the top. (2) A person's hands reach into the frame and pull a large, heavy-looking bag of gummies from the shelf. The camera follows the movement as the bag is moved towards the camera. (3) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top and a pearl necklace, appears as a large bag of gummies is playfully dropped or swung against her head/shoulder. She squinted her eyes and laughed, clutching the large bag tightly. (4) The woman poses with a joyful expression, holding the large bag against her chest and smiling directly at the camera while nodding slightly. (5) A close-up shot focuses on the clear window of the gummy bag, revealing dozens of smaller individual packets of gummies inside. (6) The camera shifts to the back of the packaging, showing a white label with fine text. A finger points specifically at the numerical value indicating the weight of the product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 大包到受傷. [Subtitle]: 小小兵軟糖. (2) [Variety]: 啦啦啦啦啦 (with emojis). (3) [Subtitle]: 哦妹妹.. (4) [Subtitle]: 買兩包. (5) [Subtitle]: 送你兩包. (6) [Subtitle]: 兩包. (7) [Subtitle]: 超多袋的小軟糖. (8) [Subtitle]: 重量竟然有. [Variety]: 一公斤!!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main female creator/host presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black square-neck top and a pearl necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse-style retail store (Costco) with high metal shelving units and stacked cardboard boxes of merchandise.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaking rapid Mandarin over a bouncy, upbeat synthesized BGM. The BGM features a steady electronic beat and playful, cartoonish synth lines. (2) A sharp 'whack' or 'thud' sound effect triggers as the bag hits the woman, followed immediately by high-pitched laughter from the speaker. (3) The speaker continues her energetic narration, her tone oscillating with excitement as she describes the product. Occasional 'pop' and 'ting' sound effects punctuate her sentences. (4) The rustle of plastic packaging is clearly heard as the bag is handled. The BGM remains consistent in tempo and volume, providing a bright, comedic atmosphere. (5) The speaker's voice reaches a peak of excitement (high arousal) when mentioning the weight of the bag, ending with a sharp, rising intonation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Interaction -> Product Details -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a giant bag of Minions-themed gummy candy available at Costco. It uses physical comedy (the bag hitting the host) to emphasize the product's surprising weight and size, followed by a detailed look at the packaging and contents to demonstrate value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of product brand, specific retail location (Costco), and enthusiastic call to purchase/value proposition.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media shopping vlog style with high energy and bright visuals designed to trigger impulse interest in a retail 'find'.
